zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Dymoke於1508年出生在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比時，他的父親Lord Robert Dymoke47歲，母親Jane Cressnore29歲。他於1529年3月與Anne Tailboys在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1566年9月16日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Dymoke于1508年出生在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比时，他的父亲Lord Robert Dymoke47岁，母亲Jane Cressnore29岁。他于1529年3月与Anne Tailboys在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1566年9月16日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

variants.name: Dimmock

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Dymoke was born in 1508, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Lord Robert Dymoke, was 47 and his mother, Jane Cressnore, was 29. He married Anne Tailboys in March 1529, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. He died on 16 September 1566, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Dymoke est né en 1508, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Robert Dymoke, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Jane Cressnore, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Anne Tailboys en mars 1529, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1566, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Dymoke 1508 in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert Dymoke 47 und seine Mutter Jane Cressnore 29. Er hat im März 1529 in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Tailboys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb am 16. September 1566 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Dymoke è nato il nel 1508 nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Robert Dymoke, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Jane Cressnore, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Anne Tailboys nel marzo 1529, nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1566, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Dymokeが1508年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで生まれた時，父Lord Robert Dymokeは47歳，母Jane Cressnoreは29歳であった。1529年3月にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメでAnne Tailboysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1566年9月16日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Dymoke(이)가 1508년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert Dymoke(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Cressnore(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1529년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 키에서 Anne Tailboys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년 9월 16일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 호른카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Dymoke nasceu em 1508, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Robert Dymoke, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Jane Cressnore, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Tailboys em março de 1529, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1566, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Dymoke родился в 1508 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Robert Dymoke было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Cressnore, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Tailboys марта 1529 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Он умер 16 сентября 1566 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Dymoke nació en 1508, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Robert Dymoke, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Jane Cressnore, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Anne Tailboys en marzo de 1529, en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1566, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
